seminarFields.activity_id: string — optional; references ACTIVITIES[].id in lib/activity-config.ts. Set only via seed scripts. Empty string when unset (not null). Controls calendar color and InfoModal content.
seminarFields.start_time: string — HH:MM format, empty if unset
seminarFields.end_time: string — HH:MM format, empty if unset
seminarFields.custom_label: string — display label when type='other', empty otherwise

activityExtensibility.howToSwitch: CURRENT_ACTIVITY を ACTIVITIES 配列の別エントリに切り替えるだけ。
activityExtensibility.howToAdd: ACTIVITIES 配列に ActivityConfig オブジェクトを追記し、CURRENT_ACTIVITY を更新する。
activityExtensibility.futureMultiActivity: seminar に activity_id フィールドを追加し、カレンダー・担当一覧で活動ごとに設定を参照する拡張が最小コストで行える。

operationalRules.commitPushPermission: Do not commit or push without explicit user instruction.
operationalRules.localDevHotReload: Use npm run dev for local hot reload. Do not run npm run build while the dev server is running.
requiredDocTerms: Do not commit or push without explicit user instruction.
Do not run npm run build while the dev server is running.
